input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.9.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.9.2
            TITLE: the main hoop must be supported by two braces extending in the forward or rearward

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.9.2: The Main Hoop must be supported by two Braces extending in the forward or rearward
F.5.9.2 The Main Hoop must be supported by two Braces extending in the forward or rearward 
direction, one on each of the left and right sides of the Main Hoop.

final_answer: The Main Hoop must be supported by two Braces extending in the forward or rearward direction, one on each of the left and right sides of the Main Hoop.
